title: 聊聊个人微信小游戏的“窒息感”：手搓了一款消消乐，发布后喜提 0 流量
content:
最近业余时间用 AI 写了一款微信消消乐小游戏，名字叫 《消灭麻将吧》。 代码敲完、测试通过、顺利上线，本以为万里长征走完了最难的一步，结果现实狠狠给了我一巴掌：发布这么多天了，后台的流量图平得像心电图停跳一样，基本全是自己和朋友贡献的。

这两天研究了一下微信小游戏的生存现状…

title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
content: OmniRoute is a free AI gateway offering unified access to 160+ providers (50+ free), including Claude, GPT, and Gemini. It supports integration with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, and Copilot. Features include RTK+Caveman compression reducing tokens by 15-95%, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A protocols, multimodal APIs, and Desktop/PWA support. Built in TypeScript with 8,060 stars and 1,362 forks.

title: 别只盯着最强模型了，Agent 场景更该看这类 Flash 档模型
content:
Chinese large language models are increasingly categorized into "Pro/flagship" and "Flash/efficiency" tiers. Pro models excel at complex reasoning and long tasks but cost more and run slower. Flash models prioritize speed, cost control, and stable task completion for production environments.

Testing four models on generating test code: Step-3.7-Flash completed ~80% in 5 minutes for 3.5 yuan (~500K tokens); GPT-5.4 achieved similar quality but cost $1 (double); DeepSeek-V4-Flash cost only 0.2 yuan but required more time; GLM-5.2 performed well with self-correction but cost 12 yuan with instability issues.

Step-3.7-Flash emerges as the optimal balance—delivering ~90% of Pro model performance at half the cost—making it ideal for high-frequency Agent workflows requiring speed, stability, and cost efficiency.
source: 掘金本周最热 - 猫猫头啊

title: Dario Amodei：AI 开源是伪命题 | 原文
content: Anthropic founder Dario Amodei argues that "AI open source" is a misnomer. He contends that publicly released AI models are better described as "open weights" since users cannot inspect internal operations or submit modifications to improve them, unlike traditional open-source software where communities collaboratively develop code.

title: 刚刚，OpenClaw和Cursor杀入手机！Agent从此塞进口袋
content: OpenClaw and Cursor launched native mobile apps on the same day, bringing AI agents to smartphones. OpenClaw's iOS and Android app enables local-first AI agents with device hardware access, allowing users to chat, approve actions, and run tasks remotely via private gateways. Cursor's iOS beta lets developers manage cloud-based coding agents from their phones, including initiating tasks, reviewing code diffs, and merging pull requests asynchronously. Both apps shift human roles from operators to approvers, untethering AI work from physical desks and accelerating an era of pocket-deployable AI agents.

title: 刚刚，Codex 首款硬件曝光
content: OpenAI unveiled the Codex Micro, a compact macro pad keyboard developed with Work Louder, at an AI engineering expo. The device features 13 mechanical keys, a joystick, and touch sensors, designed to streamline developer workflows with its Codex AI coding tool. Rather than pursuing speculative AI-native hardware like pins or handhelds, OpenAI chose a practical desktop productivity tool. This reflects a dual hardware strategy: serving developers with functional accessories while simultaneously developing a consumer AI device with former Apple designer Jony Ive.

title: 麦肯锡最新报告：未来5年，最有价值的3种人
content: McKinsey's report identifies "alignment cost" as the hidden drag in traditional hierarchies—training, meetings, and approvals that bridge human capability gaps rather than create value. As AI reduces these costs through three phases (human-to-human, human-to-code, human-to-agent), organizational power shifts from position-based to output-based to capability-based. Most companies remain stuck in "augmentation" ( embedding AI in old workflows); true "reinvention" requires redesigning work around AI-native coordination. For individuals, the imperative shifts from execution to judgment, from training-dependent to shareable skills, and from assigned roles to self-directed contribution.
eventKey: 麦肯锡最新报告-未来5年-最有价值的3种人
